title: Oscularia piquetbergensis
taxonomy: Oscularia piquetbergensis belongs to the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its succulent leaves and stems, and the presence of white or yellow flowers. The genus Oscularia is part of the tribe Ruschieae, which is a group of succulent plants native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Oscularia piquetbergensis is a species of succulent plant endemic to South Africa, specifically found in the Western Cape. Its unique characteristics and growth habits have led to its classification within the Aizoaceae family.
